overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a neon-drenched futuristic urban arcade. The environment features heavy use of cyan, purple, and orange neon lighting, digital billboards, and transitions through a psychedelic multicolored corridor before emerging into a commercial plaza with prominent corporate signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian shopping arcade with food vendors

events.description: moving from open street into enclosed covered walkway with teal neon lighting
passing by pedestrians and food stalls on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered arcade, passing food stalls and digital displays on the left

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white clothing walking away from camera along the right wall
pedestrian in dark clothing walking toward the camera in the distance

entered.detail: overhead concrete and metal walkway structure with exposed industrial pipes
cyan and purple neon strips illuminating the ceiling and structural beams
small red-roofed food vendor stall with glass windows and metal frame
large illuminated advertisement screen mounted on the left wall
large rectangular concrete planter containing mature trees

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the player entering a covered pedestrian arcade bathed in teal and purple neon light. The environment features industrial overhead structures, a red food kiosk on the right, and digital billboards on the left. Sparse pedestrians walk through the space, and large planters with trees line the right side of the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional corridor with seating and large military advertisements

events.description: ambient lighting shifts from cool teal to warm orange neon strips along the ceiling
passing large Battlefield Control Systems billboard with purple accent lighting

agents.ego_description: continuing through the arcade as the lighting changes to warm orange, passing seating areas with loiterers

notable_agents.action: homeless person sitting on white bench with belongings scattered nearby
pedestrian walking ahead in the distance toward the colorful corridor entrance

entered.detail: long linear amber neon lights running along the ceiling edges and corners
large wall-mounted advertisement for military systems with purple base and white text
glass ceiling panels showing dark night sky above the arcade
white modern benches with people resting and socializing

segments.scene_description: The lighting transitions dramatically from teal to warm orange as the player moves deeper into the arcade. A massive military-themed billboard dominates the left wall while skylights reveal the night sky above. The right side features seating areas where NPCs rest, and the corridor opens up slightly with more vegetation in planters.

scene_state.functional_zone: psychedelic advertisement corridor with chromatic floor lighting

events.description: entering narrow corridor with multicolored illuminated floor tiles and tiled walls
intense saturated lighting from pink, blue, and yellow floor tiles creates psychedelic atmosphere

agents.ego_description: walking through the surreal multicolored corridor with reflective floor tiles, following a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in plaid shirt walking ahead into the corridor
pedestrian in brown outfit exiting the corridor toward the camera

entered.detail: narrow passage with pink, blue, yellow, and green illuminated floor tiles and beige tiled walls
large purple-framed advertisement showing a man with desert background and 'AVANTE' text
neon pink text advertisement for 'WET DREAM' with purple background
advertisement with Japanese text 'ニコーラ' and beverage imagery

segments.scene_description: The player enters a surreal, narrow corridor completely enclosed with tiled walls and a psychedelic multicolored floor that shifts between pink, blue, yellow, and green. Large advertisements for 'Avante' and 'Wet Dream' line the walls. The lighting is intensely saturated, creating a stark contrast to the previous orange-lit area. Pedestrians move through the narrow space in both directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial plaza with prominent corporate signage and billboards

events.description: exiting colorful corridor into open commercial area with prominent SoftSys neon sign
turning right to face the Pure Overkill billboard and explore the plaza

agents.ego_description: emerging from the corridor and looking around the commercial plaza, turning toward large billboards and open space

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown outfit walking left across the plaza
pedestrian in white jacket walking away toward the distant exit

entered.detail: large cyan neon sign reading 'SOFTSYS' above a doorway with teal lighting
large illuminated advertisement with yellow text 'PURE OVERKILL' and running figure graphic
spacious open area with multiple pathways converging and distant neon signage

segments.scene_description: The player exits the psychedelic corridor into a spacious commercial plaza featuring prominent corporate signage. The 'SoftSys' neon sign glows cyan on the left, while the 'Pure Overkill' billboard dominates the wall. The environment returns to a darker, more open aesthetic with teal accent lighting. The player turns to explore the area, revealing multiple pathways and distant pedestrians moving through the plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a futuristic urban arcade that transforms from a neon-lit pedestrian walkway into a surreal psychedelic tunnel before opening into a corporate plaza. It begins in a covered arcade bathed in teal and purple light, passing a red food kiosk and digital billboards beneath industrial overhead structures. As the camera moves deeper, the lighting shifts dramatically to warm orange tones, revealing military-themed billboards and skylights that open to the night sky. The scene then narrows into a surreal, enclosed corridor where the environment becomes intensely saturated, featuring a multicolored floor shifting between pink, blue, yellow, and green beneath glowing advertisements. Finally, the camera exits this vibrant tunnel into a spacious commercial plaza, where the aesthetic returns to a darker tone accented by cyan SoftSys signage and a dominant Pure Overkill billboard.
